rulings.Case Title: ERIC LINKER VS. PRIVANTHA RUWIN PERERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Portions Of The Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Nov 14, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANTs DEBORAH NGUYEN, CHRISTIAN NGUYEN, and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s Motion To Strike Portions Of The Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the attorney's fees and prejudgment interest requests. Non-opposition filed. Motion is denied as to the request for punitive damages. Fraud is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIC LINKER VS. PRIVANTHA RUWIN PERERA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Nov 14, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANTs DEBORAH NGUYEN, CHRISTIAN NGUYEN, and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges causes of action for false disclosure statement, fraud, deceit and negligence against the moving defendants. Plaintiff alleges that these defendants were aware that the exclusive use agreement has been revoked prior to the execution of contract (Complaint, paragraph 29). Nevertheless moving defendants made affirmative representations regarding the exclusive use of the garage and concealed the true facts regarding revocation of the agreement. Additionally, while defendants argue that they were under no obligation to provide information beyond visual inspection, Defendants took it upon themselves to make the disclosures regarding the garage and incorporated by reference seller's representations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AURORA MARTINEZ SANGIL ET AL VS. ALEN PTEROSYAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action And For Attorney Fees And Costs In The Amount Of $7,260.00; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; Declaration Of Michael Avanesian, Esq. And Alen Petrosyan In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 14, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT ALEN PTEROSYAN MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action And For Attorney Fees And Costs In The Amount Of $7,260.00 GRANTED. No viable real properly claim is alleged and there is no showing of likelihood of prevailing on the merits. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AURORA MARTINEZ SANGIL ET AL VS. ALEN PTEROSYAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 14, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT ALEN PTEROSYAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. The issues of Sangil's title (fraud and forgery) have been raised and fully litigated in the unlawful detainer action. Sangils has a full and fair opportunity to present their evidence in the Unlawful Detainer action. Under such circumstances this action to quite title is barred by res judicata/collateral estoppel. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COLETH EGU VS. SMITH AWAMBU ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 14, 2018 line 8. DEFENDANT SMITH AWAMBU Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; Order Admissions Deemed Admitted; Order For Continuance; And Order For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Plaintiff to provide complete verified responses without objections to Request for Production, Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $500. = (501/REQ)
